cardenergy:Recovery.NAME: Recovery
cardenergy:Recovery.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Return up to 2 exhausted basic cards to your discard pile.

cardenergy:RottingShelter.NAME: Rotting Shelter
cardenergy:RottingShelter.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Draw !M! card. NL NL rot

cardenergy:Stockpile.NAME: Stockpile
cardenergy:Stockpile.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. Deal !D! damage. NL NL hoard 3

cardenergy:ScrapSpray.NAME: Scrap Spray
cardenergy:ScrapSpray.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL NL consume
